channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Premier League boss sacked minutes after latest loss, ending brief and winless tenure with Nottingham Forest
item.description: Nottingham Forest dismissed manager Ange Postecoglou after Saturday's loss, which marked eight consecutive winless games in just 39 days at the helm.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Postecoglou fired, Haaland scores 2 more for Man City and Arsenal profits again from a corner
item.description: Around 20 minutes. That's how long it took Nottingham Forest to fire manager Ange Postecoglou after losing to Chelsea 3-0 in the Premier League on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ryan Blaney channels 'Macho Man' Randy Savage for Talladega inspiration
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (AP) — His title hopes in danger after an early crash in the opening race of NASCAR's third round of the playoffs, Ryan Blaney looked for some inspiration heading into a critical race at Talladega Superspeedway on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Miami's perfect season hopes are dashed as Beck throws 4 interceptions in loss to Louisville
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Carson Beck had not thrown four interceptions in any college game. He hadn't lost a home game as a starter since his senior year of high school. He was undefeated when playing against unranked opponents. All that was true until Friday night.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brewers outclassed by Ohtani and big-money Dodgers as rousing season ends with NLCS sweep
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Turned out the National League Championship Series was indeed a mismatch, just as Milwaukee Brewers manager Pat Murphy suggested. But not only in payroll and star power. On the baseball field, too. Where it really matters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Scores: Week 9 of the high school football season in Bakersfield, Kern County
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- We are nearing that championship season. This week is the time to determine which teams are the real deal. Several teams made their cases Friday night. Below are the scores from this week's games: Thursday, Oct.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani hits 3 homers and strikes out 10 in Dodgers' clinching 5-1 NLCS win over Brewers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani propelled the Los Angeles Dodgers back to the World Series with a two-way performance for the ages.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Larkin's overtime goal lifts Red Wings past Lightning, 2-1
item.description: Dylan Larkin scored on a breakaway 3:36 into overtime to give the Detroit Red Wings a 2-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Lightning on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rashee Rice to play first game for Chiefs in more than a year after suspension
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Rashee Rice knows almost to the day how long it's been since he played in a game for the Kansas City Chiefs. Two more days until he does it again.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blue Jays' Max Scherzer refuses to leave mound in heated exchange with manager in Game 4 win
item.description: Toronto Blue Jays starting pitcher Max Scherzer let his manager, John Schneider, have it during a mound visit in the team's 8-2 win over the Seattle Mariners in Game 4 of the ALCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Alabama star Damien Harris explains why Crimson Tide doesn't want teams to fear them
item.description: Former Alabama Crimson Tide running back Damien Harris explained why he believes his old squad doesn't care about whether the team is feared on Saturdays.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs out with concussion after accident at home, coach says
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs will miss Sunday's game against Washington after sustaining a concussion in an accident at his house, coach Brian Schottenheimer said Friday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carter Hart agrees to join the Golden Knights after being acquitted of sexual assault
item.description: Goaltender Carter Hart has agreed to sign with the Vegas Golden Knights, becoming the first of the five 2018 Canada world junior hockey players to land an NHL contract since they were acquitted of sexual assault in a high-profile case.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coach tackled, concussed 8th grade football player, mom says
item.description: “As I was catching the ball on offense, the coach got mad and said," Patreon Williams, an eighth grader said.
item.dc:creator: Ka'Tani Gouch, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host fan appreciation night at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is hosting its annual Fan Appreciation Night on October 18th at Snapdragon Stadium, featuring giveaways, food trucks, games, and a halftime light show, with proceeds going to local charities.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Rays infielder named Rawlings Gold Glove Finalist
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (WFLA)— Tampa Bay Rays infielder Taylor Walls has been named one of the three American League finalists for a Rawlings Gold Glove Award. The shortstop is joining Texas' Corey Seager and Kansas City's Bobby Witt Jr.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mammoth fans get creative for historic home opener
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - From dressing in full mammoth costumes, to looking like cavemen, Utah Mammoth fans got creative for their team's historic home opener Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Scripps Ranch’s Winning Duo: Gardinera and Taylor Built More Than a Football Team
item.description: Scripps Ranch head football coach Marlon Gardinera and offensive coordinator John Taylor have led the team to multiple successes, including a 2021 CIF Division 2-A state championship, and Taylor will take over as head coach next year.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Spicer, Fox 5

item.title: How a despondent run game and a kicker on his last leg have the Believin' Bears marching on
item.description: The Chicago Bears won a hard-fought game against the Washington Commanders, thanks to the late-game heroics of running back D'Andre Swift and kicker Jake Moody.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Rondé Barber discusses the Bucs' legendary 'Tampa 2' defense
item.description: Cornerback Rondé Barber sits with News Channel 8's Aileen Hnatiuk to break down how the "Tampa 2" works and what makes it so effective.
item.dc:creator: Will Richardson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mahomes leads the Chiefs to a 30-17 victory over Lions, and a fistfight erupts at the finish
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs knew they were going to have a fight on their hands when the Detroit Lions, riding a four-game winning streak and a whole bunch of momentum, rolled into Arrowhead Stadium on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USU drops shootout at Hawaii, 44-26
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) - Micah Alejado threw three touchdown passes and ran for another score on Saturday night to help Hawaii beat Utah State 44-26 for the Rainbow Warriors' first win over the Aggies since 2010.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mammoth beat Nashville in overtime, 3-2
item.description: NASHVILLE (ABC4 Sports) - The very first victory for the Utah Mammoth was a dramatic one. Dylan Guenther scored at 2:56 of overtime and the Utah Mammoth rallied for a 3-2 win over the Nashville Predators on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: These are the most memorable Olympic shootout goals
item.description: When the NHL instituted the shootout in 2005 to decide games instead of ties, it came after the American Hockey League experimented with it the previous season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation
